Appearances:
Plaintiff,is present. Represented by
Attorney Saul Ferster appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Randy Larson is present.
Attorney Nathaniel Player representing the defendant.
The Judge Pro Tem Gary Louie, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 525, for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

This case settled, the trial date of OCT-11-2011 is vacated.
